title: Anthropic rents SpaceX?
summary: Anthropic partnered with SpaceX to access Colossus, a large GPU cluster. The video argues that Anthropic's lack of vertical integration in chips and infrastructure is a competitive weakness compared to other frontier labs, and that the AI race is increasingly defined by hardware control rather than model benchmarks.
